title: Boeit Niet Create
description: A complete Create experience with the most popular and fun add-ons, optimized for multiplayer servers
body:
# Boeit niet Create
**Boeit niet Create** is a fun and optimised Minecraft modpack featuring the Create mod and Create addons. It also has custom terrain generation and it is intended for multiplayer use.

# Features
- **The Create mod** – It has the new Create v6 in vertion 1.21.1.
- **Optimized Gameplay** – Smooth mouse controls and performance tweaks.
- **Play with friends** – It has some fun mods that are for multiplayer use.

# Installation (Modrinth App)
1. **Download & Install** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. **Login** with your Minecraft account.
3. **Browse** on the left sidebar.
4. **Search** for "Boeit Niet Create".
5. **Download** the first result.

# Support
We are working on a Discord server but for now DM Domplanto on Discord.

# Credits
This project is part of **Don't Care**.

- **Domplanto** Developer.
